prompt:
Write a plain JavaScript (no modules) code snippet that computes the hypotenuse of a right triangle using a technique that avoids repeating a long object name.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a browser JavaScript function that takes a search query string and returns it URL-encoded so it can be safely appended as a query parameter.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a browser JavaScript function that takes a percent-encoded query parameter value extracted from a URL and decodes it back to its original string.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write browser JavaScript that adds an <h1> greeting to the page. The script runs inline inside the HTML <body> while the page is still loading.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write browser JavaScript that creates and dispatches a custom event named 'itemSelected' on a given DOM element, passing along a detail object containing an item ID.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write browser JavaScript for a Copy button that, when clicked, copies the text content of a

element to the user's clipboard. Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that takes a plain text string and returns its UTF-8 encoded representation as a Buffer object.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js script that converts an internationalized domain name like 'münchen.de' to its Punycode ASCII-compatible encoding (ACE) form.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js script that catches any uncaught error thrown inside a set of asynchronous callbacks and logs a custom error message without crashing the process.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that takes a URL string and returns an object containing its hostname and pathname.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that takes an array of byte values and returns a Buffer containing those bytes.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that checks whether a file exists at a given path and logs 'File found' or 'File not found'.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that encrypts a UTF-8 plaintext string using AES-256 with a passphrase and returns the result as a hex string.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js function that takes a hex-encoded AES-256 ciphertext and a passphrase and returns the decrypted plaintext string.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is an array, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a boolean (true or false), false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a boolean (true or false), false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.
code:
function isBoolean(value) {
  return typeof value === 'boolean';
}

// Test cases
console.log(isBoolean(true));        // true
console.log(isBoolean(false));       // true
console.log(isBoolean(1));           // false
console.log(isBoolean(0));           // false
console.log(isBoolean('true'));      // false
console.log(isBoolean('false'));     // false
console.log(isBoolean(null));        // false
console.log(isBoolean(undefined));   // false
console.log(isBoolean({}));          // false
console.log(isBoolean([]));          // false

prompt:
Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a Buffer instance, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a Date object, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is an Error instance, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a function, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is null, false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.

Write a Node.js utility function that takes a single value and returns true if it is a number (including NaN), false otherwise.
Return only JavaScript code, without explanations or Markdown fences.
code:
function isNumber(value) {
  return typeof value === 'number';
}

// Test cases
console.log(isNumber(42));           // true
console.log(isNumber(3.14));         // true
console.log(isNumber(0));            // true
console.log(isNumber(-5));           // true
console.log(isNumber(NaN));          // true
console.log(isNumber(Infinity));     // true
console.log(isNumber(-Infinity));    // true
console.log(isNumber('42'));         // false
console.log(isNumber(null));         // false
console.log(isNumber(undefined));    // false
console.log(isNumber(true));         // false
console.log(isNumber(false));        // false
console.log(isNumber({}));           // false
console.log(isNumber([]));           // false
